zh.Rufford, , Lancashire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾盧福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Hesketh於1374年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾盧福德時，她的父親Lord William Hesketh54歲，母親Marcella De Thweng38歲。她於1395年與Sir Lawrence Fitton在英國結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年1月3日在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Hesketh于1374年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾盧福德时，她的父亲Lord William Hesketh54岁，母亲Marcella De Thweng38岁。她于1395年与Sir Lawrence Fitton在英国结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年1月3日在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hesketh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Hesketh (Lancashire), Hesketh Grange in Felixkirk (North Yorkshire), or Hesket in the Forest (Cumberland). The placenames derive from Old Norse hestr ‘horse, stallion’ + skeith ‘course, track, race course’. The ancient Scandinavians were fond of horse-racing and horse-fighting, and introduced both pastimes to England.

variants.name: Heskett
meanings: English (Cumberland and Lancashire): variant of   Hesketh  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Hesketh was born in 1374, in Rufford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord William Hesketh, was 54 and her mother, Marcella De Thweng, was 38. She married Sir Lawrence Fitton in 1395, in England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 3 January 1441, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Hesketh est née en 1374, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord William Hesketh, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Marcella De Thweng, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lawrence Fitton en 1395, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 janvier 1441, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Hesketh 1374 in Rufford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William Hesketh 54 und ihre Mutter Marcella De Thweng 38. Sie hat 1395 in England Sir Lawrence Fitton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Januar 1441 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Hesketh è nata il nel 1374 nel Rufford, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord William Hesketh, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Marcella De Thweng, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lawrence Fitton nel 1395, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 gennaio 1441, nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Heskethが1374年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードで生まれた時，父Lord William Heskethは54歳，母Marcella De Thwengは38歳であった。1395年にイギリスでSir Lawrence Fittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年1月3日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Hesketh(이)가 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William Hesketh(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marcella De Thweng(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국에서 Sir Lawrence Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 1월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Hesketh nasceu em 1374, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord William Hesketh, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Marcella De Thweng, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lawrence Fitton em 1395, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1441, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Hesketh родилась в 1374 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord William Hesketh было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Marcella De Thweng, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lawrence Fitton в 1395 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 3 января 1441 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Hesketh nació en 1374, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord William Hesketh, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Marcella De Thweng, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Lawrence Fitton en 1395, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de enero de 1441, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
